summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Shivdhara Charitable Trust Admin Panel. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend admin panel testing verified all CRUD operations for Gallery, Stories, Blog, Page Content, Settings, Donations, and Contact Messages sections.
passed_tests: Admin Login - Successfully logged in with admin@shivdhara.org / Admin123!
Admin Dashboard - Shows stats for Total Donations (0), Amount Raised (₹0), Unread Messages (1), Success Stories (3)
Page Content Section - Displays content in EN/GU with edit capabilities for Home, About, Donate, Contact pages
Page Content Edit - Successfully edited hero_subtitle content with bilingual inputs and save confirmation
Gallery Section - Shows 4+ albums with Add/Edit/Delete buttons, successfully created 'Test Album from Playwright'
Gallery CRUD - Create, Read, Update, Delete operations all working via API
Stories Section - Shows 3 success stories with Add/Edit/Delete buttons
Stories CRUD - Create, Read, Update, Delete operations all working via API
Blog Section - Shows 3 blog posts with Add/Edit/View/Delete buttons
Blog CRUD - Create, Read, Update, Delete operations all working via API
Site Settings - All 7 tabs working: Contact Info, Bank Details, Trust Details, UPI, Email (SMTP), Razorpay, Impact Stats
Settings Update - Impact stats successfully updated via API
Donations Section - Shows donations list with Export 80G Data button
80G Export - CSV export endpoint working correctly
Contact Messages - Shows contact submissions with Mark read functionality
Contact API - Submit and fetch contact messages working
Auth API - Login, Register, /auth/me endpoints all working
Public APIs - Gallery, Stories, Blog, Settings public endpoints working without auth
seed_data_creation: Test data created during API tests was cleaned up. Gallery album 'Test Album from Playwright' was created during UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel fully functional. All CRUD operations tested for Gallery, Stories, Blog, Content, Settings, Donations, Contacts. Backend API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_admin_api.py can be reused for regression testing. Admin credentials: admin@shivdhara.org / Admin123!
